category_sources: source_facts.description says mature production-ready implementation of the Raku language; official repository is Rakudo for Raku on supported backends.
display_name_sources: Official Rakudo homepage and GitHub repository use Rakudo; source_facts.name is rakudo.
docs_sources: Official Rakudo homepage provides project entry point; official Raku documentation site provides language documentation linked from Rakudo pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Raku implementation; official GitHub repository describes Rakudo as Raku on MoarVM, JVM, and JS.
